zh.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder是Johann Schroder的兒子，於1611年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾。他於1649年之前與Catharinam Hoyer在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1674年5月25日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫賀特賀斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder是Johann Schroder的儿子，于1611年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾。他于1649年之前与Catharinam Hoyer在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1674年5月25日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫賀特賀斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Schroder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Hans, Klaus, Darrold, Dietrich, Erna, Frieda, Gunther, Horst, Juergen, Otto.

variants.name: Schroeder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Horst, Alois, Ernst, Ewald, Gerhard, Klaus.

North German (mainly Schröder): occupational name for a cloth cutter or tailor, from an agent derivative of Middle Low German schrōden, schrāden ‘to cut’. The same term was occasionally used to denote a grist miller as well as a shoemaker, whose work included cutting leather, and also a drayman, one who delivered beer and wine in bulk to customers; in some instances the surname may have been acquired in either of these senses. This surname is also found France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. Compare Schroder .

nameMeanings.name: Henrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder was born in 1611, in Herstelle, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany as the son of Johann Schroder. He married Catharinam Hoyer before 1649, in Herstelle, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 25 May 1674, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Herstelle, Höxter, Westphalia, Prussia.

fr.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder est né en 1611, à Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, fils de Johann Schroder. Il a épousé Catharinam Hoyer avant 1649, à Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1674, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Herstelle, Höxter, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse.

de.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder wurde 1611 in Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland, als Sohn von Johann Schroder geboren. Er hat vor 1649 in Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Catharinam Hoyer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1674 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Herstelle, Höxter, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder è nato il nel 1611 nel Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania come figlio di Johann Schroder. Lui sposato Catharinam Hoyer prima del 1649, nel Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 maggio 1674, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Herstelle, Höxter, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.

ja.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroderは1611年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターハーステルでJohann Schroderの息子として生まれた。1649年以前にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターハーステルでCatharinam Hoyerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1674年5月25日に故郷で63歳で死去し，プレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンhoクスターハーステルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder(은)는 1611년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 허스텔에서 Johann Schroder의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1649년 이전 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 허스텔에서 Catharinam Hoyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1674년 5월 25일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 ho스터 허스텔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder nasceu em 1611, em Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha filho de Johann Schroder. Ele casou-se com Catharinam Hoyer antes 1649, em Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1674, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Herstelle, Höxter, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.

ru.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder родился в 1611 г. в местности хирстелл, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. Его отца звали Johann Schroder. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharinam Hoyer перед 1649 г. в местности хирстелл, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 мая 1674 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хирстелл, хoкстир, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия.

es.lifeSummary: Henrich Schroder nació en 1611, en Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania como hijo de Johann Schroder. Se casó con Catharinam Hoyer antes de 1649, en Herstelle, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1674, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Herstelle, Höxter, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.
